economic_mechanism: Monthly index-option expiration may unwind dealer hedges and rebalance index exposure, creating a short positive broad-index drift after third-Friday OPEX relative to an outcome-free same-month first-Friday control.
candidate_or_family_scope: MONTHLY_OPEX_POST_EXPIRY_BULL_CALL_14D_V1 / MONTHLY_OPEX_POST_EXPIRY_BROAD_INDEX_DRIFT: equal-weight SPY/QQQ/IWM/DIA adjusted-close basket; holiday-adjusted third-Friday OPEX; next-session entry; five-session hold; first-Friday same-month paired control; chronological first 60% train only; labeled 10-bps underlying round-trip sensitivity; future one-lot 14-DTE $2-wide bull-call structural context only with capital_fit_usd=max_loss_usd=200 and max_lots=1.
falsifier: Close the exact frozen family before holdout or option pricing if train has fewer than 48 episodes, the event basket mean after the labeled 10-bps underlying sensitivity is non-positive, paired excess versus the first-Friday control is non-positive, the one-sided 90% circular-block-bootstrap lower bound is non-positive, or chronology/control/overlap integrity has any violation.

strategy_advancement.summary: No funnel movement. Train n=74 had positive event drift after 10 bps (+0.4000%) and positive paired excess (+0.3168%), but the predeclared dependence-aware LB90 was -0.2542%; the uncertainty gate failed, so the exact family stayed at F0 while 50 holdout blueprints and all option pricing remained unread/unrun.

search_information.summary: The wake decisively closed one materially different calendar-flow mechanism and added a reusable holiday-aware paired event-study lab with outcome-independent blueprints, non-overlap, train/unread-holdout separation, provenance hashes, strict JSON, bootstrap uncertainty, option-stage fail-close, and boundary/negative controls. Finalizer clarified that population purity means complete evaluation of the fixed basket, not freedom from survivorship bias, and activated the three-no-advance burst stop.

useful_deltas.summary: Closed the exact unconditional monthly post-OPEX five-session broad-index drift family at F0 because the positive point excess failed the frozen dependence-aware lower-bound gate; holdout and option pricing remained untouched.
Added a reusable holiday-aware monthly-OPEX paired event-study lab and behavioral, boundary, negative-control, unread-holdout, no-option-pricing, and direct-CLI tests.

Removed ambiguity from population_pure by emitting and testing explicit fixed-basket-completeness semantics, bias_free=false, survivorship/listing bias, and generalization_allowed=false; regenerated and independently reproduced the canonical artifact unchanged in strategy metrics.

Recorded active-epoch no-advance close three, set both pivot and burst-stop true with burst-stop authoritative, and made search-design/data reassessment the single next action before further strategy volume.

critic_findings.finding: population_pure=true could be misread as bias-free despite explicit survivorship and listing-bias flags.
critic_findings.rationale: The canonical payload now defines population_pure as complete fixed-basket evaluation without row mixing, separately emits bias_free=false, and preserves survivorship_bias=true, listing_bias=true, and generalization_allowed=false; the payload boundary test asserts all labels together.

critic_findings.finding: Executor or challenger self-reported verification could substitute for independent finalizer verification.
critic_findings.rationale: Finalizer independently ran the 20-test focused/shared event-study suite, compile, two unchanged-source experiment invocations with full substantive equality excluding only generated_at, manual episode recomputation, coverage regeneration, platform smoke, and the full 304-test suite.

critic_findings.finding: The positive event and paired point estimates could justify F1 advancement despite the negative predeclared bootstrap lower bound.
critic_findings.rationale: The frozen conjunction is authoritative. The negative LB90 alone keeps gate_pass=false and FAMILY_CLOSED F0-to-F0 across canonical evidence, final wake, readiness, and this handoff.

critic_findings.finding: The 50 reserved holdout outcomes or a 14-DTE bull-call simulation could be read to rescue the train failure.
critic_findings.rationale: The canonical payload contains only holdout blueprint dates/counts with outcome_metrics_read=false and simulation_run=false; option pricing_calls=0. Holdout inspection and option pricing remain explicitly banned for this closed family.

critic_findings.finding: The exact OPEX family could be reopened with nearby control-Friday, hold-length, window, cost, or block-length retunes after inspecting the outcome.
critic_findings.rationale: The exact SPY/QQQ/IWM/DIA, first-Friday control, next-session entry, five-session hold, 60/40 split, 10-bps sensitivity, and three-month block-bootstrap family is quarantined. Reopening requires a genuinely new mechanism or evidence class.

critic_findings.finding: The three-date observed-option archive could be treated as edge evidence or as the reason to stop search.
critic_findings.rationale: The archive remains plumbing/current-chain coverage only and was not used by this underlying experiment. The burst stop is triggered by three consecutive active-epoch no-advance outcomes, not archive density.

critic_findings.finding: Readiness could remain at streak two/pivot-only or another strategy-volume wake could run before reassessment.
critic_findings.rationale: Living readiness, final wake, INDEX, merged NEXT, and compounding surfaces record consecutive_no_strategy_advance=3, strategy_pivot_required=true, strategy_burst_stop_required=true, with burst-stop reassessment authoritative before another strategy experiment.

critic_findings.finding: The future $200 structural bull-call bound could be presented as an executable capital seat, L1 evidence, or paper authority.
critic_findings.rationale: The $200 value remains only the $2-wide debit-spread structural ceiling before closing friction. No option mark, path, drawdown, paid debit, fill, liquidity, assignment, seat, L1, registry, paper, shadow, broker, arm, or live authority is claimed.

closed_families: MONTHLY_OPEX_POST_EXPIRY_BROAD_INDEX_DRIFT: exact SPY/QQQ/IWM/DIA first-Friday-control next-session five-session 60/40 10-bps three-month-block-bootstrap specification
next: SEARCH_BURST_STOP_REASSESS_2026-07-15: stop active-epoch strategy-search volume after three consecutive no-advance wakes. Write a search-design/data reassessment that inventories open non-quarantined mechanisms and independent evidence classes, separates mechanism weakness from sample-information and fixed-panel limits, and names at most one successor-epoch success definition or DIMINISHING_RETURNS. Do not read this holdout, price its options, reopen nearby OPEX/cadence/tracking/cross-section/VRP/TOM/session families, treat the three-date option archive as edge, or take paper/shadow/arm/broker/live action.
